source_metadata.description:
Thursday, 8 May 2025 Petitions Committee

Petition of Benjamin Plows-Kolff: Fair and affordable food regulations for small food businesses

Benjamin Plows-Kolff, Nicole Hecht & Tracy Johnson 

Ministry for Primary Industries
Vincent Arbuckle, Deputy Director-General, New Zealand Food Safety
Jenny Bishop, Director Food Risk Management, New Zealand Food Safety
Bruce Arnold, Director Cost Recovery, MPI
Maria Gracie, Manager Policy and Performance, Cost Recovery, MPI

Ministry for Regulation
Paul Delahunty, Deputy Chief Executive, Reviews and System Capability
Charlie Hulley, Senior Advisor

Petition of Zane Allan: Ban Geoengineering and Weather Modification in New Zealand

Zane Allan, Robina Dobbie and Gabrielle Thompson
